entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: and the coding here is javascript, not java

entry.title: Re: LMS user license type update automation
entry.content:
Hello there,

Depending on the scenario of how you import the users, but technically we would use the User Connector - SF for platform users, which should have a status of "Active", and use the User Connector for external learners, which should have a status of "Functional".

By separating the connectors, you should be able to predefine the license type from the config file for the connectors.

Hope that helps.

Thanks, Sunny

entry.title: Re: Bringing Apps Onto SAP Fiori Launchpad - SAP S/4HANA User Experience
entry.content:
Hello @ruth_groene,

Could you please tell me if there is a method to copy/transfer a technical catalog created with Launchpad Designer to a technical catalog in Launchpad App Manager? Is there a plan to implement such a tool in the future? For example, there is an application /UI2/FDM_GTP “Create launchpad pages from groups” for creating pages from existing tile groups.

Best regards, 
Costiantyn

entry.title: Re: How to properly Bind SAPUI5 SmartTable in CAP to SAP...
entry.content: tableBindingPath = "/V_TEST(PARAM1='X',PARAM2='Y')/Set"? I do not understand how can I use tableBindingPath here. I do not have someting like "Items" in my entity that I should nav to. Probably can add /Set, but, I need to add the input parameters first.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere External Access Overview: APIs, CLI and SQL
entry.content:
Hey Henri, great work putting all this info together!

This is super helpful for navigating the different ways to access Datasphere externally. 

One thing I noticed though - we're still missing proper APIs to fully interact with DSP programmatically. The CLI is useful but limited, and each approach (REST, OData, SQL) only gives you part of what you need depending on what you're trying to do.

Would be nice to have a more unified API layer someday rather than this fragmented approach. But your guide definitely makes working with what we have much easier! Thanks for documenting all this in one place.

entry.title: A quick introduction to SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Diagnostic Tool
entry.content:
What is the SAP SuccessFactors Diagnostics Tool?

The Employee Central Diagnostic Tool is a self-service feature that helps HR Administrators, Implementation Consultants and Customer Support teams identify and resolve system issues quickly. Whether it's a failed workflow, a misfiring rule, or a configuration inconsistency, the tool offers visibility into what's happening behind the scenes - without needing to comb through backend logs.

Key Benefits

  • Workflow & Rule Tracing: Understand exactly which rules and workflows triggered during transactions like New Hire or ESS/MSS events.
  • Centralized Services Transactions (Employee Data Save Transactions): Trace how data changes are processed and spot issues in real-time. And how save rules are executed in detail and sequence.
  • Proactive Troubleshooting: Catch misconfigurations early and reduce dependency on external support.

How It Works

This tool is built leveraging the Centralized Services Feature which was incrementally delivered for all EC entities in last 3 years.

When Should You Use It?

Use the Diagnostic Tool when:

  • A workflow fails to trigger, or routes incorrectly.
  • Business rules don't behave as expected during a hire, transfer, or data change.
  • You want to validate configuration changes in a test environment.
  • You're preparing logs and insights for a support ticket.
  • You need to know what the reason for a field value change was when you actually changed another field.
  • You want to proactively audit rule execution and system behavior.

Want to try it?

  1. Head to Admin Center > Diagnostic Tool in your SAP SuccessFactors environment, choose the type of transaction you with to analyze (e.g. Centralized Services or Workflows).

     

  2. Enable tracing using the link in landing page if you want to capture save transactions. For workflows trace capturing this enablement is not required.

     

  3. Next, reproduce the issue by saving changes in Employee's Data- any HRIS/EC entity like Job, personal, compensation information with right Role-based permissions enabled for you.
  4. Go back to the Diagnostic Tool and search for your recent transaction by entering 'Requested By' and today's date.
  5. Select the transaction you want to analyze and review Snapshot view for field changes or Rule Execution View to analyze rule executions during the transaction.

     

Final Thoughts

This tool puts diagnostic power directly in your hands - making it easier to resolve issues faster, ensure compliance, and improve user experience.

Resources:

Here are Official SAP Resources:

SAP Help Portal - Diagnostic Tool

What's New Viewer - 1H 2024 - New Diagnostic Tool for Employee Central Transactions

What's New Viewer - 2H 2024 - New View and Enhancements to the Diagnostic Tool

What's New Viewer - 1H 2025 - Enhancements to the Diagnostic Tool

Knowledge Base Articles:

 3468733 - Diagnostic Tool for Employee Central save transactions and workflows

3469437 - Incorrect email notification, workflow approvers, business rule for workflow or workflow configuration is selected by system - Employee Central
3469432 - Centralized Services save actions are resulting in incorrect data update - Employee Central

Next Steps:

Looking forward for you to use this tool and try if it helps in your configurations/issue analysis, share your feedback how useful it was for you, and also if anything else you would like to see in this tool with me!

You can leverage the comment section here or formally create SAP Customer Influence idea.

2090228 - How to submit enhancement ideas for SAP SuccessFactors Products

entry.title: Re: Hybris user not authenticated after SAML successful r...
entry.content:
@phoude 

I am facing the same issue as you did. Implementing CDC as IDP for B2B.

I've read the suggested article but can't really pin point where the ootb code is failing. Can you provide more insights on your findings as far as root cause, but also the solution?

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
@HarveyXu ...it's less of a "need" and more of a desire to not disrupt the status quo.  For reasons I am not privy to, that's how it's been at our organization: BizX has historically sorted users as FIRST M LAST, and Learning has sorted users as LAST, FIRST M.  

The inability to turn off General Display Name for 1H 2025 disrupts that.  It's not as if that poses major problems, but it is an annoyance that Learning administrators have been vocal about, so...an easy way to manipulate sort order in both environments independently (without having to license Employee Central) would be a "nice to have."

entry.title: EC benefits UK pension to Infotype 0071
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Has anyone implemented the integration of EC Global Benefits for UK pensions to Infotype 0071 in ECP?
Our ECP consultant has suggested using a custom MDF portlet for pensions, integrated via SFAPI. However, the customer prefers to maintain a standard EC setup using Global Benefits.

We are also recommending an integration approach using CPI to transfer data from EC Global Benefits to Infotype 0071 in ECP.

Would appreciate your thoughts—what would be the best approach in this scenario?

entry.title: Re: SAC – Integrated Financial Planning – DRIVER6 & alloc...
entry.content:
Hi again, @Susanne_Helbig .

We are running the public cloud version in the backend. The documentation you sent is for the private edition. However, I took a look at the equivalent of that documentation for the public cloud version. As you can see, the procedure is quite different. Furthermore, I believe we have successfully implemented the required steps in this documentation. This is because, without a functioning communication scenario, system, agreement etc. we would not be able to import any data or perform any queries. In our system, we are able to import data from the public cloud edition system we are running, so I believe these steps have been performed correctly.

For the public cloud edition, the documentation states that the folder Statistical Key Figures – FINSSKF should be visible, but it is not. Note, please, that many other folders are visible and queries can be built from them and imports can be executed.

Is it possible that there is a different underlying issue?

Thank you again for your help and best regards!

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-development-tools-user-guide/working-with-space-templates-uist

At the top of the documentation is says "cross-product", but further down: "Launchpad Page templates can be created for SAP BTP ABAP Environment and SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment."

entry.title: Re: How to properly Bind SAPUI5 SmartTable in CAP to SAP...
entry.content: google please, the question is answered before.....

entry.title: Re: Issue with Determining Current Day of the Week in CDS...
entry.content:
Hello Saikrishna,

As I can see that you're currently using the following logic:

MOD(DATS_DAYS_BETWEEN(CAST(CONCAT(SUBSTRING($session.system_date, 1, 4), '0101') AS ABAP.DATS), $session.system_date), 7) + 1 

This return incorrect results because January 1st of a year doesn’t always fall on a Monday, and you're using that as the reference "day 1 


Let's consider known reference date (e.g., 01.01.1900, which is a Monday), rather than the start of the current year:

Calculation logic should be

MOD(DATS_DAYS_BETWEEN('19000101', $session.system_date), 7) + 1

This assumes:

  • 1900-01-01 was a Monday (which it was),

  • The calculation returns days of the week as: Monday = 1, ..., Sunday = 7. 

For example, let's say today's date is 2025-04-22 (Tuesday): 

DATS_DAYS_BETWEEN('19000101', '20250422') = 45751
MOD(45751, 7) + 1 = 2  → Tuesday

Best Regards,

Pooja

entry.title: Re: FieldGlass integration for requisition creation
entry.content:
Hi Arjen

A prerequisite to Position Management/Job Requisition integration is an exclusive SSO configuration for the integration user between Success Factors and Fieldglass. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-employee-central/using-sap-fieldglass-with-employee-central/prerequisites-for-employee-central?locale=en-US

Part of this configuration in Fieldglass must be done by a Fieldglass representative and you'll need to raise a ticket. You need to provide Success Factors' OData API url, username, password and API version.

BR,

Josie

entry.title: Re: RAP Application with two Root View Entity with Associ...
entry.content: got your struggle! If you’re avoiding composition, the fix for unmanaged is all about letting the parent handle the child's create, not the child itself. You can’t define create in the item’s behavior. it’ll always throw that "dependent entity" error. Instead, in the header’s behavior, enable create via its association to the item (like association _Items { create; }). For managed, composition automates child CRUD, just define the parent-child as a composition and skip manual logic. Both work, but unmanaged needs manual parent-controlled creation. Check associations and parent behavior setup

entry.title: Re: How to properly Bind SAPUI5 SmartTable in CAP to SAP...
entry.content: Alright.

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: post your latest code, let's see what is going on.

entry.title: Re: Using a Function Module in SAP RAP managed
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have solved the issue by wrapping BAPI_USER_CREATE1 logic in a remote-enabled custom function module

I have created a custom function module with the below parameter but first make sure to enable remote module as shown below

 

Next for the import i used the below ofc you can add more attributes if you want to use more just use BAPI_USER_CREATE1 as your reference. 

As for the source code i used the below

and at last i called the custom FM in my method as shown below

METHOD add_user.
  READ ENTITIES OF zi_user1_rh IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY User
    ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(users).

  LOOP AT users INTO DATA(user).
    CALL FUNCTION 'Z_CREATE_SU01_USER'
      STARTING NEW TASK 'USRCREATE'
      DESTINATION IN GROUP DEFAULT
      EXPORTING
        iv_username  = user-username
        iv_firstname = user-firstname
        iv_lastname  = user-lastname
        iv_password  = 'passworD123@@'.
  ENDLOOP.

    READ ENTITIES OF zi_user1_rh IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY User
    ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(userlist).
    result = VALUE #( FOR user1 IN userlist ( %tky = user-%tky %param = user  ) ).


  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: How to assign role validity dates different from user access dates (WS USER_ACCESS_REQUEST)
entry.content:
HELLO,

it's my first question, enjoy

We have an Identity Management application wich call webservice USER_ACCESS_REQUEST on SAP GRC system, to create/modify users in a S/4HANA productive system, with ARQ and BRM GRC' modules.

Is it possible to manage different validity date scenarios for user access and role validation ?

apparently the sap standard only calculates dates for roles; if roles have a time limit, then validity dates at account level will be adjusted, 
validfrom and validto dates are not taken into account in the userinfo parameter group.

For example, how do you manage access for a student or trainee who is only present for a month in the future? e.g. between September and December 2025?

with other value or other parameter ? now with ReqType (002) and ProvAction (006)

thanks a lot for your support !

David

entry.title: Re: Fetching Change request number with customer number o...
entry.content:
Hi,

It has been a long time ago where I was developing for the MDG... I rembered tables starting with USMD ... maybe that helps? I think there is also a class ... cl_usmd_* and the method read_entity_data or something like that. Maybe you can check this out.

entry.title: Re: Using a Function Module in SAP RAP managed
entry.content:
Hi,
The error occurs because the RAP framework manages its own database commits. When you call BAPI_USER_CREATE1 directly within a determination or action, the BAPI’s internal COMMIT WORK conflicts with the framework’s implicit commit handling, causing a nested commit error. Here’s the solution:

Call BAPI_USER_CREATE1 via RFC FM in a separate LUW:

CALL FUNCTION 'ZCreateUser'
      STARTING NEW TASK 'UPDATE'
      DESTINATION 'NONE'
....

This would definitely resolve the dump you are getting.
RAP the Bapi in an RFC FM.

entry.title: Re: Message no. SO322; document of this type is not allowed in your system
entry.content:
The procedure to solve the error is described in the SAP note 2184005 - Error message: Documents of this type are not allowed in your system (SO322) for attachments - SAP for Me

1) Transaction SOPE. Check that all the document types are there and configured correctly.

2) Transaction SLG1 of object SCMS (KPro) may show authorization errors or other errors:

3) Report RSCMST to check the server

entry.title: FU: No propagation of dates and times between stage 1 and 2
entry.content:
Hello,

For SAP TM, we are currently working with support package SAPK-16010INSAPTM.

We are experiencing an issue with scheduling from the Transport Cockpit.
We have FUs with three stages:
- Stage 1: visible in the TC
- Stage 2: not visible in the TC
- Stage 3: visible in the TC

Stage 2 of these FUs is not visible in the TC because no date (neither pickup date nor delivery date) is initially entered.

This wouldn't be too serious if the date/time propagation worked when scheduling stage 1: the Arrival date/time from stage 1 would then be propagated to stage 2 as the Earliest Acceptable Pick-Up Date/Time... and the second stage of the FU would then be visible in the TC.

However, this propagation mechanism works well for FUs of at most two stages... but fails for FUs of at least three stages.

How can this problem be solved?

Thank you for your support

Kind regards,

entry.title: Re: Direct Deployment of UI Integration Cards to SAP Work Zone
entry.content:

Or can UI Integration cards also be deployed to BTP ABAP and subsequently provided to Work Zone (standard or advanced) via the BTP ABAP environment as a content provider, just like other custom BTP ABAP Fiori apps?

Do you have any recommendation that I can try and fix the connection issue that I am running into? Any assistance would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Using a Function Module in SAP RAP managed

entry.title: Re: Unexpected Credit Check Error During PGI Without an a...
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, even if a Credit Segment is not explicitly assigned to a Sales Area, the system can still perform a credit check during Post Goods Issue (PGI) if the Business Partner maintains an active Credit Segment at the master data level.

Secondly, you’re encountering a credit check failure during Post Goods Issue (PGI) even though no Credit Segment is maintained for the Sales Area. According to standard O2C/OTC behaviour, this should suppress the credit check; however, it still gets triggered in your scenario.

Verified Root Cause (S/4HANA Public Cloud)

Credit checks are still triggered if

1. A Credit Segment Exists at Business Partner Level
Even if the Sales Area is not assigned, an active Credit Segment (e.g. 1010) for the Business Partner activates credit management globally.

This is a standard behaviour in the Public Cloud environment and is not over-ridden by the absence of Sales Area mapping.

2. PGI Triggers a Scope-of-Check That Is Credit-Sensitive
PGI (Post Goods Issue) uses a delivery document type that may include a scope of check, including credit control.

This check is unconditionally triggered if credit management is active globally (via the BP’s Credit Segment).

3. Cross-Sales Area Credit Logic Applies
Even if the specific Sales Area doesn’t have a mapping, the system inherits behaviour from other Sales Areas or Channels where a Credit Segment exists.

Solution: Ensure Full Consistency Between Credit Segment and Sales Area

Option 1: If You Want to Disable Credit Checks
Open the “Manage Business Partner” app.

Navigate to the Credit Segment Data tab.

Remove or deactivate the Credit Segment (e.g. 1010) for that Business Partner.

Ensure no other credit segments exist under that BP that could trigger global credit management.

Option 2: If Credit Management Is Required – Assign Sales Area Properly
Open the “Assign Sales Area to Credit Segment” configuration app.

Add entries to map the relevant Sales Areas to the Credit Segment (e.g. 1010).

This prevents “orphan” credit control behaviour and gives you clean control over credit checks by Sales Area.

Option 3: Adjust or Review PGI Scope-of-Check
PGI errors might also stem from the scope of the check defined in the system for outbound delivery types.

S/4HANA Public Cloud, this can only be changed via SSCUI (if exposed) or SAP Expert Configuration via an incident.

Feel free to let me know if you need further assistance

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Post Goods receipt for service order
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

To post a goods issue to an order in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition as a Warehouse Clerk, you'll typically follow a process that involves using the "Post Goods Movement" app.

However, this does NOT work with service orders -> Error message below.

Is there a way how this can be configured? I would like to have an app for the warehouse clerk to post a goods issue for a service order.
BR
Simon

Order 8000000080 not found or not permitted for goods movement

Message no. C6001

Diagnosis

Either the order 8000000080 does not exist or you have specified an order for which the function you want cannot be executed. For example, no goods receipt for a CO internal order or no goods issue with reference to a reservation can be carried out.

Procedure

Check your entries and select an order for which the desired function is permitted.

entry.title: Express document "Update was canceled" received from author in FB05
entry.content:
I received the error "Express document 'Update was canceled' received from author" while trying to clear a document in FB05.
When I checked SM13, I found the update termination (screenshot attached).
I also encountered the same issue when attempting to reverse the document in FB08.
I also checked the number range, but it didn’t help.

Has anyone faced this before? Any suggestions on how to resolve this?
Thanks in advance for your support!

I added a characteristic in the date format. The field for allowing intervals is checked.

Now when i search for equipments in the CL30N (classtype 002), I can use "inclusive" and "exclusive" only.

Is there a way to allow "greater than" and "less than"?

Thank you in advise!

entry.title: Re: Adapt a Maintenance Notification Type for Use in 9-Phase Maintenance Process of SAP S/4HANA Main

I noticed a note (3571459) that suggest it may be possible to provide the ability to create Maintenance Requests via the same App F1511A by using Adapt UI to include the Notification Type in a dropdown? Has anyone come across this?

entry.title: Re: Outbound process with SAP EWM: POSC, WOCR & Wave Management
entry.content:
Hi Sai Kumar,

While the internal process steps in SAP EWM are predefined and somewhat hardcoded, it is indeed possible to customize them through development if there are specific business requirements. However, in most cases, the standard internal process steps provided by SAP are comprehensive and robust enough to cover a wide range of warehouse scenarios effectively, minimizing the need for custom enhancements.

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP IAS Federated Access AWS Cognito
entry.content:
Hello SAP-Community,

In a recent project for a client, we had a feature request that consisted of making a Fiori application available in SAP BTP Workzone, so far so good. Currently, this client has a mobile application developed by a third party that uses AWS Cognito as an identity provider (IdP) and our need is to provide access to this Fiori application without a request new login.

My question would be whether it is possible to establish a trust relationship between SAP IAS and AWS Cognito so that a new login operation is not required? If so, is there any documentation or a step-by-step guide to help us?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Want to merge transaction line in SAC model based on a dimension member
entry.content:
Hello,

I am using SAC planning model and have data like this:

 

DIM ADIM BDIM CAmount
01/04/2025APEQMP155
01/04/2025APEQMP255
01/04/2025APEQMP355
02/04/2025APEQMP170
02/04/2025APEQMP270
02/04/2025APEQMP370

I want data to be like this:

 

DIM ADIM BDIM CAmount
01/04/2025APEQMP55
02/04/2025APEQMP70

So basically, i want to merge my DIM C lines to 1 line and put the average of the amount against it. And later want to delete those 3 lines.

Please not that i already have master data updated for DIM C.

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: Do you mean all code from the whole output form template, or just from this field? The full code is obviously long and could contain sensitivities. Here below is all code from that particular field (with the customer code partly censored). Most of it is copied from another field, but the field name, the caption and the piece of javascript are specific to this field. </field> <field name="CustomerVATRegistrationCH" w="150mm" h="6.15mm"> <ui> <textEdit> <border presence="hidden"/> <margin/> </textEdit> </ui> <font size="9pt" typeface="Calibri"/> <margin topInset="1mm" bottomInset="1mm" leftInset="1mm" rightInset="1mm"/> <para vAlign="middle"/> <caption reserve="60mm"> <para vAlign="middle" spaceAbove="0pt" spaceBelow="0pt" textIndent="0pt" marginLeft="0pt" marginRight="0pt"/> <value> <text xliff:rid="A047A429-4532-493D-8F02-BB7E1BC7EFB9">VAT No.CH:</text> </value> <font size="9pt" typeface="Calibri" weight="bold" baselineShift="0pt"/> </caption> <border> <edge presence="hidden"/> <corner/> <corner presence="hidden"/> <corner/> <corner presence="hidden"/> </border> <bind match="none"/> <event activity="initialize" name="event__initialize"> &lt;script contentType="application/x-javascript">if(this.parent.Partner.rawValue =="100XXX") {this.rawValue ="TEST";} else { this.presence = "inactive"; } &lt;/script&gt; </event> <value> <text maxChars="20"/> </value> </field>

entry.title: Re: Default text determination in the GTS Customs declaration document
entry.content: Caveat: With this technique, you can default a maximum of 100 char per text ID.

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: Unfortunately, I can't get it pasted with formatting

entry.title: Re: BDC on t- code EC60
entry.content: No button,key of position, find etc exists in the t-code.

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: do you know what is code????

entry.title: Re: Timestamp in SRT_MONI Reflecting When Message Was Fir...
entry.content:
Hello @ybuc 

Given the synchronous nature of message processing, it can be argued that a message truly leaves SRT_MONI once it is fully processed by CPI, i.e. once step 4 is done. Before that the message is still owned by SRT_MONI or rather S/4 side - if message processing fails, the error handling is S/4 responsibility not CPI's. Therefore the execution date/time fields or last change date/time fields give you the correct timestamp of when the message truly left SRT_MONI.

I don't think you can get in SRT_MONI a timestamp when a message processing started in CPI.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: choosing rows/columns from data source to show in Data Analyzer using a script from story
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I know you can call the data analyzer from the story and it works fine but how can I specify dimensions and measure for the columns and rows programmatically.  Right now, I have to manually select them once the DA opens.  I know I can call pre-built insight but there you cannot pass parameters.  Both options have limitations.  I am calling DA when user clicks on a product on a chart.  I do not want to build out all rows and columns in a table in the story as it is a lot of data and slowing down the story performance.  Appreciate the help.

NavigationUtils.openDataAnalyzer("HANACLOUD",
"[Schema_HDI_DB_1][Pkg_HDI_DB_1][view_name]",
[ UrlParameter.create("connectionType", "HANACLOUD"),
UrlParameter.create("systemType", "HANA"),
UrlParameter.create("f01Dim","Product Description"), // filter name
UrlParameter.create("f01Val",result),   //filter value

UrlParameter.create("f01Op","in")], true);

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: This is S4Hana public cloud. This is all code (xml, javascript) I can get to. As said, I'm not familiar with programming jargon and I realize I don't use it correctly.

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: relax... that's okay, we all started with everything at some point 😉 I will try reproducing this case. I'm not that familiar with Javascript coding in Adobe Forms, but, based on my experience, the little things are the things that cause the error.. I need some time, I hope you find the error before that, let's see 😄

entry.title: Re: Advanced Production Planning- EWM Synchronization🏭--📦--🏢
entry.content:
Hello @schulte-bahrenberg 

Thanks for bringing this up — your observation is absolutely valid.

Ideally, with the stock determination strategy configured to pick from F2, the system should consume directly from unrestricted-use stock without requiring materials to be posted into P2 upfront.

However, in this specific scenario, the raw materials were already posted to P2 due to upstream planning decisions. As a result, the system simply utilized the stock that was already available in P2 at the time of staging. Once the P2 stock is consumed and reaches the final destination (e.g., after staging or goods receipt), it is converted or posted into F2 , So the behavior observed aligns with system logic.

Appreciate your insights — always helpful to align on the intent vs. actual flow.

Best,
GowthamParasa

entry.title: Re: SAC – Integrated Financial Planning – DRIVER6 & alloc...
Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: It may have been misleading of me to post the piece of javascript in the first place, because I don't know if that's what causes the problem. It was as FYI. The problem is that the hardcoded value doesn't get displayed.

entry.title: Re: SAC – Integrated Financial Planning – DRIVER6 & alloc...
entry.content:
Hi @Aleque,

if you setup the communication scenario, arrangement, and system correctly then you should be able to see C_FinStatisticalKeyFigure.
Please create an SAP case on component CO-FIO-SAC-PL-2CL so that we can have a look into your system for further investigation.

Best regards
Susanne

If it runs through the if statement in the javascript I don't think there is a problem with the element itself, but who knows. Maybe you can have a look into the link i sent you -> Scripting basics.

entry.title: Don't miss out: A few spots still available for our AI-assisted process analyzer beta program
entry.content:
The future of process mining is democratization: don't miss the opportunity to test our new AI-assisted process analyzer and discover how this capability can make process mining ever more accessible to a wider audience.  

Process mining is vital for any organization but is often regarded as a field reserved to experts who are familiar with data analysis and complex query language. The AI-assisted process analyzer capability changes that perspective. It is designed to democratize process mining, making it accessible to a broader range of stakeholders. Regardless of their technical expertise, a wider range of users can use natural language to obtain deep and immediate insights that inform strategic and business decisions.

Two key features available for testing in our open beta program for all SAP Signavio Process Intelligence customers:

AI-assisted process analyzer, text to insights 

Users with diverse skill sets, regardless of their technical expertise, can describe their inquiries in natural language to obtain immediate insights on their process performance and data. ​ Different stakeholders can obtain valuable knowledge that can inform decisions by using a conversational approach. 

AI-assisted process analyzer, text to widget

Users can express their queries in plein text and immediately generate new dashboard widgets (such as value widgets and bar charts)  that they can add to their workspace for continuous monitoring. All users, can visualize data in the way that is most relevant and intuitive to them, and regardless of their technical expertise, they can create their own analyses independently.

About the beta program 

This open beta program grants early access to the capability, allowing you to explore its features and see how they support your business needs.

Why participating 

By joining our beta program, you will have the opportunity to:   

  • Access Early Innovation: Gain early access to our new AI-assisted process analyzer and test this capability with your own processes, data, and landscape before its official release.  
  • Shape the Future: Provide valuable feedback on features, usability, and quality, helping us refine and perfect this innovative capability.   

Participation requirements: The beta program is free of charge and open to all SAP Signavio Process Intelligence customers with an active license.  

Timelines

  • The program registration period ends on May 15th, 2025.
  • Participation is on a first-come, first-served basis, starting from the signing of the TEA (Test and Evaluation Agreement).

Seats are limited, so act fast! Contact your customer success partner or account manager to apply or write me directly here.

Don't miss this chance to be part of SAP Signavio's latest AI innovation. Join us in shaping the future of process intelligence, for more information about our process AI capabilities, visit this page.

entry.title: Re: HANA Vector Engine and LangChain

Is there any plan for this new package to also include document chunck based on the HANA native _SYS_AFL.PAL_TEXTSPLIT procedure ?

entry.title: Re: BAPI_REQUISITION_RELEASE not updating FIXKZ (Fixed indicator) in EBAN
entry.content: Please follow the enhancement for updating fixed indicator to 'X' when Purchase requisition is released from ME55n

entry.title: Re: How to update some fields of EBAN in ABAP code
entry.content: Please follow the enhancement for updating fixed indicator to 'X' when Purchase requisition is released from ME55n

entry.title: Re: Sales Pricing Condition Discount applied only on a sp...
entry.content:
HI @DanailKamenov 

I understand that you have requirement that if the gross order value (excluding freight) reaches a defined threshold (e.g. 20,000 EUR), then apply a 100% discount only to the freight condition (ZFRC). 

There can be multiple solutions to solve this issue and three of then are detailed below:-

Approach 1: Using Freight Scales (No New Condition is needed)
If the freight charge is fixed or can be scaled simply, you can maintain a scale directly on ZFRC with pricing scales. 

Maintain Scales in ZFRC:

From Value (EUR)Amount (EUR)
0100
20,0000


Approach 2: Using a Separate Amount Freight Discount Condition (ZFRD)
Use a new condition type ZFRD that only applies when the gross order value threshold is reached. ZFRD will apply a fixed amount discount equal to the freight cost (ZFRC). Here you will need to maintain ZFRD in scales with same amount as of ZFRC like once 20,000 EUR amount is reached then discount of 100 EUR is applied.

Maintain Scales in ZFRD:

Example:

From Value (EUR)Amount (EUR)
00
20,000100 (same as ZFRC)


Approach 3: Using a Separate Freight percentage Discount Condition (ZFRD) with custom routine
Use a new condition type ZFRD that only applies when the gross order value threshold is reached(using scale). 

Maintain Scales in ZFRD:

Example

From Value (EUR)Percentage
00
20,000100

Create Custom Routine in Alternative Calculation of Condition Amount to:

Check if the scale % is 100
Retrieve the value of ZFRC from the condition lines
Apply 100% of ZFRC as the condition value for ZFRD

For implementing the custom logic below link can be referred
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/f90a91ef60d345b0aa49e919f481d2d7.html?locale=en-US

Important scenarios to be checked during testing

  • Order value = 19,901-19,999 → ZFRD not applied 
  • Order value = 20,000 → ZFRD = -ZFRC
  • Change freight amount → ZFRD dynamically matches ZFRC

entry.title: SAP Translation hub in Learning Module?
entry.content:
Hello hello

I found very interesting the SAP Translation Hub related to the use of AI for translation (https://www.sap.com/products/artificial-intelligence/translation-hub.html#features) And I was wondering If you are aware of its use in Learning. I searched for information but I was not able to find any mention to integration with the Learning module. I read is via BTP but my guess is that is not possible to connect with LMS, but it will be very useful to translate description, surveys, titles in LMS for customers that have many languages enabled.

Any info is appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

Cris

entry.title: Re: BDC on t- code EC60
entry.content: Okay, so modifying the standard code to add a function code and implement scrolling is the easiest and least invasive solution.

entry.title: Re: S4Cloud: Adobe Form - custom field hardcoded text not...
entry.content: Thanks a million Fabienne; I can't check it today anymore but will get back to this tomorrow. I suppose you mean the data binding for the "Partner", which is present elsewhere in the form, but I'll further check tomorrow.

entry.title: Re: Timestamp in SRT_MONI Reflecting When Message Was Fir...
entry.content:
You latest comment is very clear and brings also more clarity on what should be my expectation from this technology. Although keep in mind I'm not asking "SRT_MONI a timestamp when a message processing started in CPI" I'm asking for "SRT_MONI a timestamp when a message leave outbound from S4 for the first time (regardless of CPI answering or not)". And probably this is not available.

Thank you again for sharing the details you gave me an understanding that I had not reached previously on how SRT_MONI and S4 is handling the communication.
May I ask you if there is an official document from SAP which breaks down the communication stream in relation to SRT_MONI?

I have made searches but I found difficult to orientate my self in SAP documentation.
I will not insist anymore on this topic, as I understand the limits, and accept your latest answer.
Regards

entry.title: Trust Configuration" in SAP BTP Trial Account – Unable to Proceed with SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

I am using a SAP BTP trial account for learning purposes and, until recently, the "Trust Configuration" option was available under the Security menu. This allowed me to experiment with services such as SAP Build Work Zone – Standard Edition.

However, I’ve recently noticed that the Trust Configuration menu has disappeared, and I am now unable to complete the setup or activation of SAP Build Work Zone, as this service requires identity provider configuration.

Could you please confirm:

  • If this is a permanent change to trial accounts?

  • If there is any alternative way to continue learning or testing SAP Build Work Zone?

  • Whether switching to a Free Tier account would restore access to Trust Configuration?

Any clarification or advice would be greatly appreciated. Thank you very much in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Isidro

entry.title: Introducing Analytical Insights in Joule: Empowering Smarter Decisions, Instantly
entry.content:
We’re excited to introduce analytical insights in Joule — a powerful enhancement to SAP’s AI copilot that puts real-time, contextual insights directly into the hands of your teams. With natural language access to harmonized business data in SAP Business Data Cloud, employees can make better decisions — faster and with greater confidence.

Introduction to Joule

Joule is SAP’s AI copilot designed to enhance the way people work. Grounded in enterprise-wide business data and SAP’s deep process expertise, Joule , speeds up decision-making, and enables users to focus on what truly matters. Through an intuitive, conversational interface, it brings the power of AI into everyday workflows — making it simple to ask, act, and deliver.

What’s New: Analytical Insights in Joule

The analytical insights feature integrates critical SAP Analytics Cloud's capabilities into Joule, allowing users to explore their data through a conversational experience. By simply asking questions in natural language, users receive instant answers presented as charts and metrics. Today, users can ask questions in English, French, German, Italian or Spanish.

Benefits of Analytical Insights

Analytical insights in Joule deliver clear, tangible value to teams across your business:

Faster, Informed Decisions for Everyone

Empower every business user to access insights directly through natural language — no technical know-how required. This inclusive approach supports a data-informed culture at every level.

Significant Time and Efficiency Savings

Cut down time spent searching for answers by providing ready access to decision-support analytics directly within SAP business application workflows. Insights surface right where employees work, helping teams move from question to action without switching tools.

Seamless Integration with SAP Business Data Cloud

Unlock the full value of your business data with Joule’s native integration to SAP Business Data Cloud. This integration ensures insights are governed, current, and compliant with your organization’s access policies.

Human-Centered Analytics

Ask questions the way you speak. Joule understands business language and turns it into visual answers, enabling more people to confidently engage with data.

Insights in Context

Access analytical insights directly within existing SAP applications, reducing the need to switch between platforms. This seamless integration ensures that insights are delivered in the context of current workflows, enhancing productivity and decision-making.

By leveraging these benefits, organizations can drive faster, more data-informed decisions, foster a data-driven culture, and achieve strategic growth through informed decision-making.

How to use Analytical Insights

Joule is designed to interpret and respond to a wide range of natural language analytical queries. Here are some examples of supported question formats:

Descriptive Questions:

  • "What is the total revenue for Q1?"
  • "Show me sales by region in 2025."

Comparative Analysis:

  • "Compare sales between 2023 and 2024."
  • "How do profits in Germany compare to France?"

Time Series Analysis:

  • "Show me sales by month"
  • "Show the trend of customer acquisitions over the last 6 months."

Top / Bottom N Analysis:

  • "Show me top 5 sales by store.”
  • "List the bottom 3 regions in terms of sales."

While Joule’s analytical insights are versatile, the actual response is based on the data made available by the data administrators, who are also responsible for the data quality.

Model Disambiguation

In environments with multiple data models, Joule helps ensure the right one is used.

Model Selection by Users: Users can specify which model to query by adding the model's name to their question. This ensures that the system retrieves data from the intended source. Alternatively, if multiple models match the user’s query, Joule will ask for their intended model.

With analytical insights in Joule, SAP continues to empower businesses to harness the full potential of their data, fostering a culture of informed decision-making and operational excellence.

Configuring Data for Analytical Insights

Analytical insights are powered by the "just ask" feature of SAP Analytics Cloud. Here, data (models) can be indexed to make them accessible for analysis in Joule. Administrators control which models are available to their business users, ensuring that the insights provided are relevant and tailored to the organization's needs.

1. Index Models

Supported Models: Analytical insights in Joule currently supports SAP Datasphere models, which are surfaced via a tunneled SAP Datasphere connection as part of a Business Data Cloud setup. Additionally, indexed acquired models can be queried​.

Adding Models: Administrators must add relevant acquired models and SAP Datasphere analytic models to just ask through the "Manage Models" area in SAP Analytics Cloud.

2. Add additional Business Semantics to your Models

Synonym Mapping: To make queries more intuitive, administrators can define synonyms for model entities and dimension values. This helps users ask questions in familiar business terminology, such as mapping "revenue" to "total sales"​.

Rules for Context-Aware Responses: Rules can be defined to adjust answers when the query lacks explicit context. For example, if a user asks, "Show me client visits and travel expenses," the rule can automatically add "by sales agents" for a more relevant response​.

3. Manage Access & Rollout

Only models indexed by administrators are accessible through Joule. All interactions are observing the data security and compliance defined by SAP Business Data Cloud.

For detailed guidance on just ask, visit:
Initial Release of SAP Analytics Cloud Just Ask

Pre-requisites

To activate analytical insights in Joule the following is required:

  • Joule Entitlement
  • SAP Analytics Cloud Enterprise license*

This feature will be available in Joule 2504 (for SAP Analytics Cloud fast-track customers) or in Joule 2505 (for SAP Analytics Cloud standard release – Q2 QRC).

Roadmap

The analytical insights feature in Joule will support SAP Datasphere live data sources outside of SAP Business Data Cloud in the future. Further, additional languages will be supported. We also continue investing in the natural language understanding, so that more complex or semantically rich questions can be answered.

*Analytical insights in Joule isn't available when access to SAP Analytics Cloud is granted via licenses for SAP LOB applications in embedded analytics scenarios

entry.title: Re: Buttons for accept/reject do not work - CRM IC
entry.content:
we fixed this issue by adding this parameter in SU3

CRM_ICWC_RENAMEVIEWS OFF

Regards

entry.title: Re: Erro Transação NFE_MNG_CERT
entry.content:
Boa Tarde Luciano

Verifique a configuração do RFC NFEACCESSHOST e NFEACCESSTOKEN e as tabelas J_1BNFE_CUST3_4V e J_1BNFE_CUST4_1V.

entry.title: Re: IDEA integration for Turkey Incoming invoices

entry.title: Re: Post Goods receipt for service order
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

Can you please check Field Status Group for the G/L ?

If you assigned YB04 FSG to your G/L account, then check in Additional Account Assignment in FSG ,here the Order should be required/optional .

In case of queries please revert.

I hope this will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: SAP CIS - User shows undefined when authentication to an application using corporate IDP
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We have an OIDC application created within SAP BTP and it has trust with SAP Cloud identity services. The application works as expected when we use Identity authentication as IDP. But when we switch the IDP to Corporate IDP (which is Entra ID), the authentication is successful however the app launches with no tiles and user shows as undefined. 

Identity federation (user store) is disabled and we have enriched the assertion attributes. Any thoughts on what could be the issue?

entry.title: QM-WM: Problem to create a TO when “stock posting type” is different from one HU to other
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I have an inspection lot created after a good receipt posting (inspection type 05). The storage location is relevant for WM. So, the system creates the corresponding HUs.

I record the results without problems, but when I post the usage decision, I have two cases:

If the posting is the sam for all the HUs, no error is raised. In these examples I posted

VMENGE01 or VMENGE04 for all the HUs.

But, if I set a different “stock posting type” for at least one HUs, the system raises an error. See the image below.

So, I must run the LT03 transaction and distribute the total quantity according to the “Stock Category” to be congruent with the “stock posting type”. For example:

As a result:

Now I can post the delivery:

The HUs are updated, properly:

And the stock is updated, accordingly.

Is it the standard behavior? I mean, if the user assigns a different “stock posting type” for one HU than other, then the TO must be processed manually?

I’m aware I can implement a Z solution, but I am not able to find an SAP Note, blog or documentation to be sure there is not a missing customizing.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification
entry.content: Hi, I completed SAP SD certifications in 2022 and 2023. I'm confused about their validity. Are these certifications valid only for one year? Do I need to take any action to keep them active or renew them? Or do they stay valid indefinitely? Please advise on how certification status is maintained. Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: Re: SAP for Me "You do not have a maintenance contract fo...
entry.content: Hi team, a few more info on that topic. The customer has an order form to move from the BPC/Netweaver version to the BPC/BWHANA version. They have to do it in April, but when they upgraded for the new version, the system kept in mind the previous one. Who can support to change this ? Thanks Thierry Josselin, EA Rise for Equans
